counterClaimFeeCostParagraph: cyBased on the information provided, it will cost {{counterClaimFee, currency(currency: GBP; trailingZeroDisplay: stripIfInteger)}} to make your counterclaim.
counterClaimFeeHelpParagraph: cyYou may be able to get help paying the fee if you (one or more of the following):
counterClaimFeeHeading2: cyDo you need help paying the counterclaim fee?

counterClaimFeeOptions.iNeedHelpWithPayingFee: cyI need help paying the fee
counterClaimFeeOptions.iDoNotNeedHelpWithPayingFee: cyI do not need help paying the fee

counterClaimFee.required: cySelect if you need help paying the counterclaim fee
